title: 专利池 —— 由内而外变体(2009 年后)

description.en: GSK pools idle IP relevant to neglected tropical diseases and opens it to external researchers under license. Modest license fee revenue is the obvious capture; the strategic capture is reputation, regulatory goodwill, and follow-on R&D leads. WIPO Re:Search (2011) extended the model to a multi-pharma consortium.
description.zh: GSK 把对被忽视热带病有关的闲置 IP 汇入池中,以授权方式开放给外部研究者使用。最直接的回收是少量许可费收入;战略层面的回收是声誉、监管善意,以及后续研发线索。WIPO Re:Search(2011)把这一模型扩展到了多家药企组成的联盟。
